name: Scottish Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Coat a baking sheet with non-stick cooking spray.
3. In a medium-size bowl, sift dry ingredients together.
4. Add butter and mix into flour using your fingers.
5. Stir in buttermilk until the dough is soft.
6. Fold in golden raisins.
7. On a floured board, roll out the dough to 1/2 inch thick.
8. Cut into 16 rounds with round cookie cutter or glass.
9. Place on prepared baking sheet and bake for 15 to 20 minutes,
until golden brown.
10. Makes 16 scones.
Food Exchanges per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE; CAL: 97; CHO:7mg;
CAR: 3g; SOD: 3g; FAT: 3g.
